conclusion: c8 grouped_compact MoE plus accepted projection-dispatch metadata now has profiler-backed retained-bench evidence. The profiled run and final retained validation both preserved generated-token equality [137,137,137,137,137,137,137,137], primitive correctness is loaded/passed, grouped MoE and projection blockers are absent, and profiler provenance/kernel-duration blockers are absent. No throughput claim is made because c8 still relies on rowchunked full attention/native_caware_decode=false and prior c8 repeatability instability remains a promotion blocker.
remaining_blockers: c8 full attention still uses native_batch_row_chunks and native_caware_decode=false
c8 grouped_compact+projection repeatability needs additional confirmation before promotion/performance claims
retained performance claims still require docs/BENCHMARK.md gates and full native c4/c8 attention

batch_blockers: native c>N decode currently supports compact physical-slot-ordered rows; full-attention batch context is native only for BF16 KV and context < 1024
full-attention decode forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path
decision_reason_summary: execution.batch_execution.row_execution must not contain serial or fallback
decode_blockers: full-attention decode forced to native row-chunk diagnostic path
